title: Nova X12 Pro
shortDesc: Flagship phone with an edge-to-edge OLED display and advanced camera system.
fullDesc: The Nova X12 Pro combines a 6.7-inch OLED panel, a fast custom chipset, 256GB of storage, and a triple-lens camera array for sharp low-light photography and smooth all-day performance.

title: AeroBook 14
shortDesc: Lightweight productivity laptop with a sharp display and all-day battery.
fullDesc: The AeroBook 14 pairs a 14-inch high-resolution display with 16GB RAM and a 512GB SSD, delivering a portable setup for developers, students, and remote professionals.

title: PulseBuds Air
shortDesc: Wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and clear call quality.
fullDesc: PulseBuds Air offers balanced sound, pocket-friendly charging, dual-device pairing, and active noise cancellation tuned for commuting, calls, and casual listening.

title: ChargeDock 3-in-1
shortDesc: Compact charging stand for phone, earbuds, and smartwatch.
fullDesc: ChargeDock 3-in-1 keeps your desk tidy with a single cable design, stable charging pad, and dedicated spots for everyday devices used at home or in the office.

title: ViewPad 11 Keyboard Case
shortDesc: Protective keyboard case that turns a tablet into a travel workstation.
fullDesc: This keyboard case features a magnetic attachment, adjustable viewing angles, responsive keys, and a slim exterior that protects your tablet without adding much bulk.

title: PixelCam Go
shortDesc: Pocket-sized action camera with stabilized 4K recording.
fullDesc: PixelCam Go captures smooth handheld footage with built-in stabilization, water-resistant housing, and fast wireless transfers for creators who shoot on the move.

title: TitanBook Ultra 16
shortDesc: Premium 16-inch laptop designed for power users and creators.
fullDesc: TitanBook Ultra 16 includes a large color-accurate display, 32GB of memory, 1TB SSD storage, and dedicated graphics performance for editing, rendering, and heavy multitasking.

title: Orbit S24
shortDesc: A slim 5G smartphone built for fast multitasking and vivid streaming.
fullDesc: Orbit S24 features a 120Hz AMOLED display, 128GB of storage, reliable battery life, and a durable aluminum frame, making it a strong everyday phone for work and entertainment.
